languages.original_text: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

languages.text: "Появление черни на мостике — сомнительное пероприятие с точки зрения безопасности. Как и раздача аугментов простолюдинам. Каждый из них может оказаться преступником или безумцем с гранатой в руке".

"Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."
languages.original_text: "Появление черни на мостике — сомнительное пероприятие с точки зрения безопасности. Как и раздача аугментов простолюдинам. Каждый из них может оказаться преступником или безумцем с гранатой в руке".

traits.locale_text: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

"Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

languages.text: 「橋に群衆を許すのは、治安の観点から疑問だ。一般市民に増援を与えるのも同様だ。彼らの中に犯罪者や手榴弾を持った狂人でもいるかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

traits.locale_text: 橋に群衆を許すのは、治安の観点から疑問だ。一般市民に増援を与えるのも同様だ。彼らの中に犯罪者や手榴弾を持った狂人でもいるかもしれない。

languages.text: « Pour des raisons de sécurité, il est malavisé de permettre à la populace d'accéder à la passerelle, tout autant que de distribuer des augmentations à des roturiers. N'importe qui parmi eux pourrait être un criminel ou un fou avec une grenade à la main. »
languages.original_text: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

traits.locale_text: « Pour des raisons de sécurité, il est malavisé de permettre à la populace d'accéder à la passerelle, tout autant que de distribuer des augmentations à des roturiers. N'importe qui parmi eux pourrait être un criminel ou un fou avec une grenade à la main. »

languages.text: "Die Duldung von Gesindel auf der Brücke ist hinsichtlich der Sicherheit eine fragwürdige Entscheidung. Ebenso wie die Ausgabe von Augmentationen an einfache Leute. Jeder von ihnen könnte ein Krimineller oder Wahnsinniger mit einer Granate in der Hand sein."
languages.original_text: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

traits.locale_text: "Die Duldung von Gesindel auf der Brücke ist hinsichtlich der Sicherheit eine fragwürdige Entscheidung. Ebenso wie die Ausgabe von Augmentationen an einfache Leute. Jeder von ihnen könnte ein Krimineller oder Wahnsinniger mit einer Granate in der Hand sein."

languages.text: "Ayaktakımının köprüde bulunmasına izin vermek, güvenliği zora sokacak bir karar olur. Sıradan insanlara ogment dağıtmak da öyle. Herhangi biri, el bombası taşıyan bir suçlu ya da deli olabilir."
languages.original_text: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

traits.locale_text: "Ayaktakımının köprüde bulunmasına izin vermek, güvenliği zora sokacak bir karar olur. Sıradan insanlara ogment dağıtmak da öyle. Herhangi biri, el bombası taşıyan bir suçlu ya da deli olabilir."

languages.text: «Consentir la presencia del vulgo en el puente es una decisión cuestionable en lo que a seguridad respecta, como también lo es repartir aumentos entre la plebe. Cualquiera de ellos podría ser un criminal o un demente con una granada en la mano».
languages.original_text: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

traits.locale_text: «Consentir la presencia del vulgo en el puente es una decisión cuestionable en lo que a seguridad respecta, como también lo es repartir aumentos entre la plebe. Cualquiera de ellos podría ser un criminal o un demente con una granada en la mano».

languages.text: “从安保角度而言，允许贱民踏足舰桥已属不智，授予平民植入物更是冒险——他们中随时可能藏着罪犯，甚至手持手雷的疯子。”
languages.original_text: "Allowing the presence of rabble on the bridge is a questionable decision in terms of security. So is handing out augments to commoners. Any one of them could be a criminal or a madman with a grenade in his hand."

traits.locale_text: “从安保角度而言，允许贱民踏足舰桥已属不智，授予平民植入物更是冒险——他们中随时可能藏着罪犯，甚至手持手雷的疯子。”
